question: Q8
claim: Uniformity caveat: standalone BM25 path omits content_hash (explicit column list, bm25-index.ts:721) so BM25-only candidates carry undefined -> tiebreak falls through to a.id (non-uniform but still S); content_hash nullable pre-migration. Fix COALESCEs content_hash to id.
